title: dump
text: dump Dump ProcScript instructions to the screen or message frame. DUMP { Module } | /all Arguments Module —name of a global ProcScript, function, operation, or an internally-generated label. If omitted, the current module is assumed. /all —dump all modules of the current component. Description Dump the statements of the ProcScript module to the message frame (if putmess on has been used previously) or to the screen ( putmess off ). Example: dump gp_store dump/all dump Copy Related Links putmess Specify the destination of the message frame output. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
